aliases: Ejército Revolucionario Popular Antisubversivo de Colombia
description: ERPAC is one of the four most powerful emerging criminal groups serving drug trafficking in Colombia, alongside Los Rastrojos, Águilas Negras, and Los Urabeños. It is led by drug traffickers Pedro Oliverio Guerrero ("Cuchillo") and Daniel Barrera Barrera ("El Loco Barrera"). The group inherited the military and drug trafficking spaces of the Bloque Centauros of the United Self-Defense Forces of Colombia.
